meta.intent: Produce one instantly legible, high-stakes rescue beat with a hero puppy hanging over the flood and a clean route that reads in seconds even to a cold viewer.
meta.expectedPath: Reject the compact upper-left bait clear, take the lower C triple to trigger the hero rescue with a clean dock recovery beat, then clear the compact upper-right A pair to free the secondary puppy.
meta.expectedFailMode: The player keeps spending actions in the bait pocket or generic clears, misses the obvious lower hero rescue beat, and lets flood pressure turn the capture read into avoidable trouble.
meta.whatItProves: The game has a genuinely captureable rescue sequence that resolves through the real action pipeline rather than a scripted fake.
meta.notes: The capture board keeps the hero sightline and roofed rescue neighbors, but the hero route now uses the lower C triple instead of the original free B triple, lowering generic/random looseness while preserving the clean capture payoff.
